name: Garlic Mustard
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees.
2. Place garlic in a small baking dish and drizzle with oil.
3. Roast garlic for 20 to 30 minutes, stirring frequently until garlic is soft.
4. Mash the garlic, removing any tough pieces.
5. Combine mashed garlic with remaining ingredients.
6. Refrigerate overnight to allow flavors to blend.
Makes 2 tablespoons per "serving".
